summary: Completed testing of Iteration 21 features: Claude Opus Integration replacing GPT-5.4. All backend APIs working (10/10 tests passed). Frontend UI verified - PreMatch page shows both Algorithm Prediction (11 factors) AND Claude Opus Analysis sections. LiveMatch page has Claude tab with real-time analysis.

minor.issue: RuntimeWarning: duckduckgo_search package renamed to ddgs - should update import

passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/ shows dataSource as 'Claude Opus + Web Scraping'
Backend: POST /api/matches/{matchId}/claude-analysis returns rich narrative analysis with factors, injuries, toss scenarios, prediction summary
Backend: Claude analysis factors have team tags (MI, DC, NEUTRAL)
Backend: POST /api/matches/{matchId}/claude-live returns real-time analysis with momentum, batsmen/bowler assessments, betting advice
Backend: POST /api/matches/{matchId}/chat works (now powered by Claude Opus)
Backend: Chat endpoint respects different risk tolerances (conservative, balanced, aggressive)
Backend: Claude analysis is cached in DB for fast retrieval
Backend: Claude analysis includes model info (claude-opus-4.5)
Backend: GET /api/matches/{matchId}/state returns live data for ipl2026_008
Backend: API indicates web scraping is the data source
Frontend: PreMatch page (/pre-match/ipl2026_008) loads successfully
Frontend: PreMatch shows Algorithm Prediction section with 11 factors (H2H, Venue, Form, Squad Strength, Home Advantage, Toss Impact, Pitch & Conditions, Key Matchups, etc.)
Frontend: PreMatch shows Claude Opus Analysis section below Algorithm section
Frontend: Claude Analysis shows win probability bar (47% MI vs 53% DC)
Frontend: Claude Analysis shows KEY FACTOR headline
Frontend: Claude Analysis shows 9 analysis factor cards with team tags (DC, MI, NEUTRAL)
Frontend: Claude Analysis shows 2 injury cards (Jofra Archer - Doubtful, Rishabh Pant - Fit)
Frontend: Claude Analysis shows Toss Scenarios section
Frontend: Claude Analysis shows Deciding Logic section
Frontend: Claude Analysis shows Prediction summary with confidence level
Frontend: LiveMatch page (/live/ipl2026_008) loads with all tabs (Consult, Claude, Live API, Models, Odds, Squad, Players)
Frontend: LiveMatch Claude tab shows Claude Live Analysis component
Frontend: Claude Live Analysis shows current state summary, momentum, win probability
Frontend: Claude Live Analysis shows batsmen assessment with threat levels (HIGH/MEDIUM/LOW)
Frontend: Claude Live Analysis shows bowler assessment
Frontend: Claude Live Analysis shows phase analysis and betting advice
Frontend: Claude Live Analysis has Refresh button
action_items: Consider updating duckduckgo_search import to ddgs (package renamed) - low priority warning
critical_code_review_comments: ai_service.py correctly uses LlmChat with anthropic/claude-opus-4-5-20251101 model
web_scraper.py implements DuckDuckGo search with proper error handling
ClaudeAnalysis.js component properly displays all analysis fields with team-colored tags
ClaudeLiveAnalysis.js component shows real-time analysis with threat level badges
PreMatch.js correctly renders both Algorithm Prediction AND Claude Analysis sections
LiveMatch.js has Claude tab in right panel with ClaudeLiveAnalysis component
useMatchData.js hook has fetchClaudeAnalysis, clearClaudeAnalysis, fetchClaudeLive methods
test_credentials: No authentication required - open access app
seed_data_creation: None - used existing match ipl2026_008 (MI vs DC) with cached Claude analysis and live data
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 21 Claude Opus integration fully working. Key changes: (1) All GPT-5.4 calls replaced with Claude Opus via LlmChat. (2) Web scraping via DuckDuckGo for real-time data. (3) PreMatch page has TWO sections: Algorithm Prediction (11 factors) at top, Claude Opus Analysis below. (4) LiveMatch page has Claude tab in right panel with real-time analysis. (5) Chat endpoint now uses Claude Opus. (6) Claude analysis is cached in claude_analysis collection. Match ipl2026_008 has cached analysis.

api_data_source.verification: API response contains dataSource field with correct value

claude_live_endpoint.verification: Response includes momentum, batsmen/bowler assessments, betting advice, win probability

chat_endpoint.verification: Returns detailed answer with consultation summary

claude_analysis_ui.verification: All elements visible in screenshot with 9 factor cards and 2 injury cards
